result: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that every person has the ability—and the support—to truly listen to one another with empathy. So many of humanity’s struggles grow from misunderstanding, isolation, or the fear of being unheard. When people feel seen and valued, they’re better able to collaborate, resolve conflicts peacefully, and build systems that reflect collective dignity. A culture of deep listening wouldn’t erase all problems, but it would create a foundation of trust and shared purpose, making it far easier to tackle every other challenge together.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
